## Class `SatSolver`

Iterative watched-literal SAT solver with chronological backtracking.

- constructor: [`SatSolver(variable_count)`](../../../math/SATSolver.py#L6)
- 引数: `variable_count`: `variable`・個数として渡す値（APIの文脈に従う）
